1.en: Introduction to microprocessor technology. Programming and experimenting with the microcomputer.

3.en: Production and distribution: BUSCH-Modellspielwaren · Postfach 1360 · D 6806 Viernheim.  Some experiments need additional power: a 9 V battery (IEC 6 F 22) or power supply 2059.  In collaboration with ELO-Magazine, Franzis-Verlag · Postfach 370120 · 8000 München 37.
